'''√th-d-v''' ('''thadava''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:latchkey|latchkey]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-d-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:latchkey|latchkey]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √th-d-v
|-
! Lemma
| thadava
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thadavithi || thadaviji || thadavishi || thadavi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thadavuthuth || thadavujuj || thadavushush || thadav
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thadavuthu || thadavuju || thadavushu || thadavu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thadavufuth || thadavufuj || thadavufush || thadavuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thadavethe || thadaveje || thadaveshe || thadave
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thadavothoth || thadavojoj || thadavoshosh || thadav
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thadavotho || thadavojo || thadavosho || thadavo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thadavofoth || thadavofoj || thadavofosh || thadavof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || thadavïf || thadavïf || thadavïf || thadavïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || thadavïfïf || thadavïfïf || thadavïfïf || thadavïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || thadavïf || thadavïf || thadavïf || thadavïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || thadavïf || thadavïf || thadavïf || thadavïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thadavæthæ || thadavæjæ || thadavæshæ || thadavæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thadavathath || thadavajaj || thadavashash || thadav
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thadavatha || thadavaja || thadavasha || thadava
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thadavafath || thadavafaj || thadavafash || thadavaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || thadavasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || gothadavasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokithadavasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || thadavnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gothadavnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokithadavnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || thadavshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gothadavnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokithadavshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || thadavroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gothadavnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokithadavroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || thadavmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gothadavnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokithadavmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || thadavsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gothadavnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokithadavsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || thadavngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gothadavnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokithadavngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || thadavyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gothadavnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokithadavyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || thadavyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gothadavnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokithadavyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || thadavnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gothadavnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokithadavnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || thadavnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gothadavnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokithadavnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || thadavnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gothadavnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokithadavnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || thadavshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gothadavnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokithadavshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || thadavshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gothadavnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokithadavshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || thadavshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gothadavnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokithadavshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || thadavronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gothadavnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokithadavronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || thadavroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gothadavnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokithadavroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || thadavromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gothadavnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokithadavromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || thadavmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gothadavnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokithadavmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || thadavmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gothadavnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokithadavmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || thadavmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gothadavnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokithadavmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || thadav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || thædæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hothadav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hothædæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohothadav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohothædæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nüthadav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nüthædæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünüthadav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünüthædæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïthadav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïthædæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïthadav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïthædæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || luthadav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || luthædæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || luluthadav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || luluthædæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lithadav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || lithædæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilithadav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilithædæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kothadav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kothædæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokothadav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokothædæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kethadav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kethædæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekethadav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekethædæv
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
